name: vibe-os-raycast
title: Vibe-OS 外脑
description: Raycast 前端壳，连接你的远程 OpenClaw 大脑
author: jungle

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: 网关地址
preferences.description: 本地 SSH 隧道地址或 OpenClaw 网关地址

preferences.name: gatewayToken
preferences.title: 网关令牌
preferences.description: 调用 /v1/responses 所需的 Bearer Token

preferences.name: agentId
preferences.title: Agent ID
preferences.description: 要连接的 OpenClaw agent 标识

preferences.name: dumpSshTarget
preferences.title: Dump SSH Target
preferences.description: 倾倒写盘使用的 SSH 目标，格式 user@host

preferences.name: dumpSshKeyPath
preferences.title: Dump SSH Key Path
preferences.description: 倾倒写盘使用的 SSH 私钥路径

preferences.name: dumpRemoteWorkspaceRoot
preferences.title: Dump Workspace Root
preferences.description: 部署机 workspace 根路径（写 memory/braindump.md）

preferences.name: dumpRemoteScriptPath
preferences.title: Dump Script Path
preferences.description: 部署机统一写入器脚本绝对路径

preferences.name: dumpSshConnectTimeoutSec
preferences.title: Dump SSH Timeout Sec
preferences.description: 倾倒写盘 SSH 连接超时秒数

commands.name: ask-vibe-os
commands.title: 问问 Vibe-OS
commands.description: 向远程 OpenClaw 大脑发起提问

commands.name: dump-to-vibe-os
commands.title: 倾倒到 Vibe-OS
commands.description: 快速倾倒一个想法到远程 OpenClaw 大脑

commands.name: rewrite-with-vibe-os
commands.title: 用 Vibe-OS 改写
commands.description: 按你的简洁指令改写一段文本
